title: Defense System Catalog Schema
description: Validates the catalog.json file defining available air defense systems.

systems.description: List of all available air defense systems.

id.description: Unique identifier. Lowercase letters, digits, and underscores; must start with a letter.

name.description: Full display name of the system.

range_km.description: Maximum engagement range in kilometers. Use 0 for shared/patrol assets with no fixed emplacement range.

threat_range_overrides.description: Per-threat-type range overrides in km. Keys are threat type strings (e.g. 'srbm', 'mrbm'); values override range_km for the cross-target range check for that type only. Omit to use range_km for all threat types.

batteries.description: Default number of batteries deployed when this system is added to a target.

shared.description: If true, this system is a shared patrol asset with no fixed emplacement. It uses a global fixed ID and its magazine is shared across all targets it is assigned to.

threats.description: Threat types this system is designed to engage.

name.description: Name of the specific interceptor, round, or weapon.

payload_kg.description: Warhead or projectile mass in kilograms. Use 0 for directed-energy weapons.

kill_modality.description: How the weapon destroys its target. Must be consistent with armament type.

standard_loadout.description: Total rounds or missiles available per battery.
